name: atomeons-lab
description: Model Context Protocol manifest for AtomEons Systems Laboratory. Exposes /api/ask as a callable tool for any MCP-compatible client (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, OpenAI MCP, custom agents). Lets the LLM ground its answers in the lab's 256 published routes via semantic retrieval + Gemini synthesis.

tools.name: ask_atomeons
tools.description: Search the AtomEons Systems Laboratory site (atomeons.com, 256 routes) for any question. Returns a grounded 2-5 sentence answer with route-level citations. Use when the user asks about AI literacy, AI research papers, cyber security, AI tool comparisons, the I AM AI book, the ORANGEBOX local-first cockpit, the B00KMAKR publishing instrument, or AtomEons's research output and methodology.

k.description: Number of distinct source routes to retrieve. 1-10, default 5.

resources.name: llm_routes_index
resources.description: Structured JSON index of the 31 highest-value lab routes with title, description, keywords, OpenGraph, and JSON-LD. Crawlable by any AI search ingestion pipeline.

resources.name: search_index
resources.description: Fuzzy-search index over 247 routes. Used by /api/ask Layer A (fuzzy retrieval) and the on-site command palette. Same shape: { records: [{ r, t, d, h, b, k, c, w }] }.

resources.name: llms_full_text
resources.description: Full-corpus dump of lab content for AI ingestion: every lesson drill prompt + every glossary term + recent letters + persona paths + levels + trust posture. Regenerated on every request. 15-min edge cache.
